{{Quote|Arrogant scum, talking to the chief like that! I'll fix him!|Koruu|<ref name="marvel79" />}}
'''Koruu''' was a furred [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who worked as a member of thugs [[Lemo]] and [[Sanda]]'s [[Lemo and Sanda's gang|gang]] on [[Arcan IV]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Koruu was with the gang at a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] when they were approached by disguised [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who were searching for information on the whereabouts of their friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Angered by what he saw as Calrissian's disrespectful way of talking to Lemo, Koruu attempted to shoot the man, only to be felled by a thrown [[Knife/Legends|knife]] as he drew his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].<ref name="marvel79" />
